content.en:
"The effect of the best stone robbery is too good!"

Ye Tian was quite excited.

He urged the Tribulation Secret Technique, coupled with the assistance of the Eternal Talent Tribulation, and the endless Tribulation Power was transmitted from inside the Superb Tribulation Stone, and he didn't know how many times stronger than the Thirty-Seven Tribulation Blood.

Of course, Ye Tian's current use of the best robbery stone is not to improve his cultivation, but to cultivate the invincible body robbery method of Ten Thousand Sources Returning to the Ruins.

At this time, Ye Tian's invincible body seemed to be constantly compressed and condensed under the effect of the return of ten thousand sources, making his physical body even stronger.

Time passed, and Ye Tian's Wanyuan Returning Ruins gradually entered, and his progress became faster and faster, but he soon ran into trouble.

Click!

Ye Tian's physical body cracked apart during a single cultivation, and his entire physical body began to become unstable.

But soon, Ye Tian recovered, but this cultivation brought a little damage to the invincible body.

"Sure enough, there was a danger, and it brought an indelible aftermath to the physical body, but it was nothing compared to the harvest. Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, he cultivated the Ten Thousand Sources of Ruins by replicating his body, so he had no effect on the main body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian began to improve the return of 10,000 yuan to the ruins, making it fit his invincible body.

After trying again and again, Ye Tian improved the Wanyuan Ruins a little, so that he would not cause hidden dangers and damage to his invincible body at the beginning.

Subsequently, the copy body continued to cultivate, and wherever he found a problem, he began to study, and he didn't care about the foundation of the copy body, and completely regarded the copy body as an experiment.

In any case, the return of 10,000 yuan to the ruins is still a terrifying invincible robbery, which will not affect Ye Tiantian's breakthrough in the future, but the hidden dangers caused will take a long time to repair, and it may have some impact on the supreme impact.

But no invincible person in the Heavenly Wind Sea could be promoted to the supreme one, and the same was true for the entire Tianlin Realm, so no one would worry about this.

If Ye Tian didn't have a copy body, he wouldn't have dared to cultivate such a top-notch body robbery method.

Years have passed in a realm, and Ye Tian has refined a superb robbery stone, and the invincible robbery body that copies the body is much stronger than before, and has already reached the first middle stage realm.

Whether it is the return of Wanyuan to the ruins, or other invincible robbers, they are all divided into six realms, which correspond to the six realms of the invincible.

If a sixth-rank invincible person cultivates the invincible body to the first level of consummation, he will be able to be promoted to a consummation state.

However, very few invincible people are able to cultivate the invincible body to the consummation level, because it consumes too many resources, and the further you go, the more difficult it becomes.

And the same is true of the top Wanyuan Guiru, it is almost impossible to cultivate to the consummation realm, but the impact is not great, even if it is cultivated to the late realm, it can easily crush the general invincible body of the consummation realm.

......

"It's almost time to go back first, there are still two top-grade robbery stones left, and this time I have copied the body to cultivate the Ten Thousand Sources to Return to the Ruins, and I have experienced a total of thirty-three inconsistencies, three of which are in major danger, and others are slightly dangerous, but they are all perfected one by one. Before the ontology cultivates the Ten Thousand Sources to the Ruins to the middle stage of the first level, there is almost no need to worry about the defects of the invincible body. Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He left the Tianlin Realm.

Tianfenghai also knew that Ye Tian was a person from the exotic world outside the Tianlin Realm, so he was not surprised at all by Ye Tian's departure.

Moreover, the power of Tianfeng Sea is very strong, and there are also branches outside the Tianlin Realm, which are divided into exotic heaven and earth, and when the time comes, Ye Tian can enter those branches to exchange resources, but those branches can only exchange very ordinary resources, and many rare resources cannot be exchanged.

Because it is very dangerous in the foreign world, if you put a lot of resources in the branch, if you are robbed by other forces, the loss will be too great.

Besides, in the Exotic World, it is more troublesome for Tianfeng Sea to want support.

Soon after.

Ye Tian's copy body returned to the Dark Forbidden Realm, and handed over the robbery weapon and the best robbery stone to the main body.

Then, Ye Tian's body officially began to cultivate the Wanyuan Return to the Ruins after the initial improvement.

In the blink of an eye, a realm of years passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already consumed a top-grade robbery stone, cultivating the Wanyuan Returning Ruins to the first mid-stage realm, and the invincible robbery body became extremely powerful.

With his current combat strength, it was already comparable to the combat power of an ordinary fifth-rank invincible.

This is the strength of the top invincible body, he can almost fight beyond the level, but he still belongs to the sixth rank invincible, not the invincible invincible, because he has not yet comprehended an invincible ancestral skill.

Ye Tian was not in a hurry to comprehend the invincible ancestral technique, and he would not go to comprehend, because his invincible body had not yet cultivated to the first consummation realm, if he accidentally comprehended the invincible ancestral technique, it would be a bad thing!

Now, Ye Tian only has one top-grade robbery stone left, and if he wants to exchange more top-grade robbery stones from Tianfeng Sea, he must prepare a large amount of robbery blood before he can exchange it for contribution points, and then exchange it for the top-grade robbery stone.

So, Ye Tian let the copy body start looking for the robbery beast.

After repeated attempts, there were also failures during the period, which led to the fall of the replica body, but not long after, Ye Tian still found a robbery beast of sixty tribulations.

The Sixty Tribulation Tribulation Beasts were equivalent to a weaker fifth-rank invincible, and with Ye Tian's current strength, if he wanted to kill him, he would have to pay a heavy price.

But Ye Tian didn't care.

He let the replica body attack this sixty tribulation beast, fought for hundreds of millions of years, and finally killed this robber beast at the cost of the replica body being severely injured and dying, and the harvest was incomparably huge.

Sixteen copies of blood, 200,000 origin rule pillage crystals, and fifteen bones robbery.

Sixteen parts of the Sixty Tribulation Tribulation Blood plus fifteen Sixty Tribulation Bones, if these treasures are exchanged for the contribution of the Heavenly Wind Sea, how much is it worth exchanging!

this day.

Ye Tian re-condensed a replica body, and took these treasures to the branch of Tianfeng Sea in an exotic world, the Yueyang Branch.

The Yueyang branch is located in the Yueyang Tiandi, and the owner of this heaven and earth is a fourth-class invincible person and an elite member of the Tianfeng Sea.

At the same time, this exotic world has been in charge of thirty-three invincibles for a long time, and the doors of other forces are not allowed to open here, only the invincibles of the Heavenly Wind Sea are allowed to enter and exit this exotic world freely.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian tore through the barrier of the Moon Yang Heaven and Earth, came to this exotic world, and after revealing the badge, he was not hindered in any way.

In the middle of the moonlight heaven and earth, a huge and incomparably large building stood there.

This is the Moon Yang Branch of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

Ye Tian walked in and met one of the heads of the Yueyang branch here, Qi Yang, who was also a fifth-class invincible and a senior member.

Tianfeng Sea has the task of collecting blood and bones for a long time, and there are also options to exchange blood and bones.

However, the price sold to Tianfeng Hai must be lower than the exchange price, otherwise wouldn't Tianfeng Hai lose money?

For example, if you want to exchange a blood robbery, you need 1000 contribution points, but if you want to sell it, you can only sell 960 contribution points.

Ye Tian didn't care about this, otherwise he would really exchange the robbery blood for the best robbery stone, and there would be no place to change it.

"I'm going to take on the task of robbing blood and bones!"

Ye Tian said.

Qi Yang nodded and handled the task for Ye Tian, and Ye Tian immediately submitted the task and handed over the blood robbery and bone robbery he obtained.

"This is the blood, bones, and !! of sixty eons"

Qi Yang exclaimed.
